data.name: EMAIL_INVALID_LENGTH
data.value: Email must be between {MinLength} and {MaxLength} characters.

data.name: FULLNAME_INVALID_LENGTH
data.value: Full name must be between {MinLength} and {MaxLength} characters.

data.name: PASSWORD_MISSING_DIGIT
data.value: Password must contain at least one digit.

data.name: PASSWORD_MISSING_UPPERCASE
data.value: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.

data.name: PASSWORD_TOO_LONG
data.value: Password must be {MaxLength} characters or fewer.

data.name: PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT
data.value: Password must be at least {MinLength} characters.

data.name: USERNAME_INVALID_LENGTH
data.value: Username must be between {MinLength} and {MaxLength} characters.

data.name: USERNAME_TOO_LONG
data.value: Username must be {MaxLength} characters or fewer.

data.name: NO_ACTIVE_TEMPLATE
data.value: No active template found for this event.

data.name: PAGE_INVALID
data.value: Page must be greater than or equal to 1.

data.name: PAGE_SIZE_INVALID
data.value: Page size must be between 1 and 100.

data.name: VOUCHER_NAME_TOO_LONG
data.value: Voucher name must be 200 characters or fewer.

data.name: REDEEM_DATE_RANGE_INVALID
data.value: Redeem start time must be earlier than or equal to redeem end time.

data.name: CAMPAIGN_NAME_TOO_LONG
data.value: Campaign name must be 200 characters or fewer.
